class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 12.0pt ; margin-right: 0in ; margin-bottom: 12.0pt ; margin-left: 0in ; line-height: normal ; background: white"><span style="font-size: 12pt ; font-family: &#34;arial&#34; , sans-serif"><font color="#0000ff">String Interpolation is a one-way data-binding<br>which is used to output the data from a TypeScript code to HTML template<br>(view). It uses the template expression in double curly braces to display the<br>data from the component to the view.</font></span></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="400" x="-300" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-29" edge="1" parent="1" source="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-9" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#000000;exitX=0.4;exitY=1.033;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.575;entryY=0.083;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-28" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-90" y="350" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="-40" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-30" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#000000;" value="<div style="color: rgb(212 , 212 , 212) ; background-color: rgb(30 , 30 , 30) ; font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; font-size: 14px ; line-height: 19px ; white-space: pre"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; margin-right: 0in ; margin-bottom: 12.0pt ; margin-left: 0in ; line-height: normal ; background: white"><span style="font-size: 12pt ; font-family: &#34;arial&#34; , sans-serif"><font color="#0000cc">event binding, which is used to handle the<br/>events raised from the DOM like button click, mouse move etc. Let’s understand<br/>this with the help of an example –</font><font color="#212121"></font></span></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="440" x="90" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-37" edge="1" parent="1" source="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-11" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#000000;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.805;entryY=-0.017;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-36" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="440" y="350" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="490" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-38" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="<div style="color: rgb(212 , 212 , 212) ; background-color: rgb(30 , 30 , 30) ; font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; font-size: 14px ; line-height: 19px ; white-space: pre"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; line-height: 19px"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; line-height: 19px"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; line-height: 19px"><div><span style="color: #c586c0">export</span>&nbsp;<span style="color: #569cd6">class</span>&nbsp;<span style="color: #4ec9b0">AppComponent</span>&nbsp;{</div><div>&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">fullName</span>:&nbsp;<span style="color: #4ec9b0">string</span>&nbsp;=&nbsp;<span style="color: #ce9178">"Rahul"</span>;</div><div>}</div></div></div></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="440" x="550" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-39" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="<div style="color: rgb(212 , 212 , 212) ; background-color: rgb(30 , 30 , 30) ; font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; font-size: 14px ; line-height: 19px ; white-space: pre"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; line-height: 19px"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; line-height: 19px"><div style="font-family: &#34;consolas&#34; , &#34;courier new&#34; , monospace ; line-height: 19px"><div>&lt;<span style="color: #4ec9b0">h2</span>&gt;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">Two</span>&nbsp;-&nbsp;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">way</span>&nbsp;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">Binding</span>&nbsp;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">Demo</span>&nbsp;&lt;&nbsp;/<span style="color: #9cdcfe">h2</span>&gt;&nbsp;&nbsp;</div><div>&nbsp;&nbsp;&lt;&nbsp;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">input</span>[(<span style="color: #9cdcfe">ngModel</span>)]=<span style="color: #ce9178">"fullName"</span>&nbsp;<span style="color: #d16969">/&gt;&nbsp;&lt;br/</span>&gt;&lt;<span style="color: #4ec9b0">br</span>/&nbsp;&gt;</div><div>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&lt;<span style="color: #4ec9b0">p</span>&gt;{{&nbsp;<span style="color: #9cdcfe">fullName</span>&nbsp;}}&nbsp;&lt;/<span style="color: #9cdcfe">p</span>&gt;&nbsp;&nbsp;</div></div></div></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="440" x="550" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-40" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fillColor=#f8cecc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 12.0pt ; margin-right: 0in ; margin-bottom: 12.0pt ; margin-left: 0in ; line-height: normal ; background: white"><span style="font-size: 12.0pt ; line-height: 107% ; font-family: &#34;arial&#34; , sans-serif ; color: #212121">two-way binding has a feature to update data from component to view and<br/>vice-versa.</span><br></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="440" x="550" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-45" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontColor=#000000;entryX=0.095;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-40" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="592" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="290" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CYpURqf21RJn-B8xCAVs-46" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fillColor=#dae8fc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 12.0pt ; margin-right: 0in ; margin-bottom: 12.0pt ; margin-left: 0in ; line-height: normal ; background: white"><span style="font-size: 12pt ; font-family: &#34;arial&#34; , sans-serif"><font color="#0000ff">Data-binding means communication between the<br>TypeScript code of your component and your template which the user sees.<br>Suppose, you have some business logic in your component TypeScript code to<br>fetch some dynamic data from the server and want to display this dynamic data<br>to the user via template because the user sees only the template. Here, we need<br>some kind of binding between your TypeScript code and template (View). This is<br>where data-binding comes into the picture in Angular because it is responsible<br>for this communication.</font><font color="#212121"></font></span></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="590" x="55" y="860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

span.font:
String Interpolation is a one-way data-binding
which is used to output the data from a TypeScript code to HTML template
(view). It uses the template expression in double curly braces to display the
data from the component to the view.

span.font:
where we bind a property of a DOM element to a field which is a property
we define in our component typescript code. Behind the scene, Angular converts
string interpolation into property binding

event binding, which is used to handle the

p.span:
two-way binding has a feature to update data from component to view and
vice-versa.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 588px; height: 1px; padding-top: 920px; margin-left: 356px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

p.style: margin: 12pt 0in; line-height: normal; background: light-dark(white, rgb(18, 18, 18));

span.font:
Data-binding means communication between the
TypeScript code of your component and your template which the user sees.
Suppose, you have some business logic in your component TypeScript code to
fetch some dynamic data from the server and want to display this dynamic data
to the user via template because the user sees only the template. Here, we need
some kind of binding between your TypeScript code and template (View). This is
where data-binding comes into the picture in Angular because it is responsible
for this communication.
